ItacPersonItem.Notes: Barbarigo played an important part in the literary life of Padua. He promoted the study of oriental languages in the Seminario, where he also established a printshop for the publication of volumes in Greek, Arabic, Armenian, Hebrew, and Syrian types. See his biography by Gino Benzoni in DBI, and by Paolo Maggiolo (2005-06).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
